sections.paragraph: m. a kid, so called from cropping the herbage; see the root גָּדָה . (Arab. جَدْىُ. id. جدية a female goat), Gen 38:23 Exo 23:19 Deu 14:21 more fully called גְּדִי עִזִּים “a kid of the goats,” Gen 38:17, 20 Gen 38:20. Pl. גְּדָיִים 1Sa 10:3 גְּדָיֵי עִזִּים Gen 27:9, 16 Gen 27:16.
